items.title: How The Evolving Story For Galaxy Digital NasdaqGS:GLXY Is Reshaping Analyst Valuations
items.description: Why Galaxy Digital’s Price Target Just Got Recut Galaxy Digital’s latest fair value estimate has shifted down from about US$47.82 to about US$43.18, as analysts reset their expectations around how quickly the business can grow and how much risk they are willing to price in. Revenue growth assumptions have moved from about 74.61% to about 14.60%. The discount rate used in several models now sits closer to 9.66% instead of 9.00%, capturing a higher required return for owning the stock. Stay...

items.title: Why The Narrative Around Waste Connections WCN Is Shifting As Analysts Reassess Growth And Risks
items.description: Waste Connections' fair value estimate has shifted only slightly, moving from about US$204.46 to roughly US$204.25 per share. This reflects a more cautious tone in recent Street research rather than a wholesale rethink of the story. Analysts are still acknowledging the company as a higher quality operator with an acquisition pipeline, but are tempering expectations around revenue growth and execution risks, including pockets of softer volume and pricing and ongoing Chiquita landfill...

items.title: Goldman Sachs signals grim shift as software stocks bounce
items.description: Software stocks are facing an increasingly loud reckoning as Wall Street rethinks how artificial intelligence affects the sector. Goldman Sachs is the latest to offer a reality check, suggesting that software's reckoning may not yet be over, even as short-term selling appears overdone and some ...

items.title: Wall Street’s wild week rattles investors’ confidence while highlighting a growing divide within markets
items.description: “It seems like there are two different markets right now,” one strategist says.
